name: Covantage
description_short: Unable to verify — website currently blocked by bot protection and inaccessible for profile research.
description_long: Covantage is listed as a credit union (NCUA-insured, member-owned institution) based on categorization data. However, their website (https://www.covantagecu.org) is currently protected by Radware Bot Manager CAPTCHA and returns only bot-detection error pages, making it impossible to access official company information, service details, leadership, membership requirements, or product offerings. The access block was triggered on April 16, 2026, at 10:39:53 UTC and may indicate either a temporary security measure or ongoing network issues. Without direct access to their website content, we cannot verify current services, fee structures, membership eligibility, or specific product offerings. Credit unions typically offer share accounts (savings), share certificates (CDs), personal loans, PALs (Payday Alternative Loans), and other member-centered financial services. Covantage's specific service menu, APR ranges, membership costs, and organizational details remain unconfirmed pending website accessibility restoration. This profile cannot be completed to research standards without verifiable website data.
services: Personal loans (typically lower rates than banks)
